data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements are optimized for quick access and selection by users.
data.technical_spec: Easily clickable buttons and hyperlinks on touch-optimized devices.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimalist design in checkout process to reduce decision time.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined checkout with limited options and clear pathways.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Benefits from consumers' accustomed ways of browsing with similarities to other e-commerce platforms.
data.technical_spec: Consistent page layout and navigation structures.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: An aesthetically pleasing user interface that enhances perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Use of color theory, typography, and visual hierarchy for engagement.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Design takes into account memory limits, presenting users with easily digestible information.
data.technical_spec: Chunking techniques applied to product information and recommendations.
